oauth2.value: ZohoPeople.employee.ALL ZohoPeople.forms.ALL ZohoPeople.forms.READ ZohoPeople.forms.CREATE ZohoPeople.forms.UPDATE ZohoPeople.leave.ALL ZohoPeople.leave.READ ZohoPeople.leave.CREATE ZohoPeople.leave.UPDATE ZohoPeople.attendance.ALL ZohoPeople.timetracker.ALL ZohoPeople.dashboard.ALL ZohoPeople.automation.ALL

description.content:
OpenAPI specification for the Zoho People HRMS REST API. Endpoints are
organized around the seven `ZOHOPEOPLE` OAuth scopes that the provider
publishes: `employee`, `forms`, `dashboard`, `automation`, `timetracker`,
`attendance`, and `leave`. All requests are authenticated with Zoho
Accounts OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens issued for the relevant scope and
operation type (READ, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, ALL).

Reference: https://www.zoho.com/people/api/overview.html


Contact Support:
 Name: Zoho People
